title: Installation & Support
metaDescription: Equipment installation, commissioning, and ongoing technical support for cinema and AV systems.
dek: Installation, commissioning, and ongoing support for the systems we supply.
body: MTE installs and commissions the systems it supplies, and provides ongoing technical support and maintenance afterward — the same team that speced the system is who you call when something needs attention.

title: Rental Services
metaDescription: Short- and medium-term rental of digital and film cinema equipment.
dek: Digital and film cinema equipment available for short- and medium-term rental.
body: MTE maintains an inventory of digital (DCP) and analog (16/35/70mm) cinema equipment available for short- and medium-term rental — useful for festivals, pop-up screenings, and temporary installations.

title: Architectural Design
metaDescription: Cinema and theater architectural design services, from concept through construction documents.
dek: Theatrical and cinema architectural design, from concept to construction documents.
body: MTE's design team works on theatrical design and sourcing for new cinemas and AV spaces — from concept and technology planning through the documentation a contractor needs to build.

title: Film & Video Post-Production and Lab Services
metaDescription: Film and digital post-production, color correction, and transfer services via Continental Film & Digital Labs.
dek: Film and digital post-production, via Magna-Tech's affiliated lab.
body: Continental Film & Digital Labs, an MTE-affiliated company, operates a film laboratory and digital imaging facility handling color correction and transfer of film and digital images, including HD and 3D formats.

title: 3D Animation & Visual Effects
metaDescription: 3D animation and visual effects services for motion picture and commercial production.
dek: 3D animation and visual effects support for production work.
body: MTE offers 3D animation and visual effects services in support of motion picture and commercial production work.

title: Audio Consulting & Acoustical Design
metaDescription: Acoustical design and sound system consulting for cinemas, theaters, and AV spaces.
dek: Acoustical design and sound-system consulting for new and renovated spaces.
body: MTE provides acoustical design — including sound insulation calculations and sketch-level acoustic design — and sound-system consulting for cinema halls, theaters, and other AV spaces.

title: Custom Design & Manufacturing
metaDescription: Custom equipment design and manufacturing for cinema and AV applications.
dek: Custom equipment design and manufacturing for non-standard requirements.
body: For requirements standard equipment doesn't cover, MTE's in-house machine shop and engineering staff design and manufacture custom components and systems.

title: Consulting
metaDescription: Independent consulting on cinema and AV system design, equipment selection, and project planning.
dek: Independent consulting on system design, equipment selection, and project planning.
body: As an independent systems integrator, MTE consults on system design, equipment selection, and project planning for cinema, AV, and planetarium projects at any stage.
